					l0.223,1.139c0.019,0.249,0.003,0.317-0.013,0.075l0.028,0.433l-0.226,1.303c-0.005,0.009-0.005,0.017-0.015,0.031l-0.698,2.263

					L162.821,361.652L162.821,361.652z"/>
			</g>
		</g>
	</g> 
	 <script type="text/javascript"> 
	 document.oncontextmenu = function() {
	  return false; 
	}  
	 document.getElementById('Layer_1').setAttributeNS(null, 'height', window.innerHeight+'px');
	var GlobalId = "Layer_1"; 
	var SelectColor;
	var ClickSelectColor;
	var ClickedElement;
	var idClickedElement;
	var ClickColor = "#6f98cf";
	var mSelColor = "#c9e2ff";
	function SF(){
	   if (window.event.srcElement.getAttribute("fill") == ClickColor){     
		 return false;
	   }
	   SelectColor = window.event.srcElement.getAttribute("fill");  
	   window.event.srcElement.setAttribute("fill", mSelColor);        
	 }
	function SF2(){
		  if (window.event.srcElement.getAttribute("fill") == ClickColor){     
			return false;
		 }
		 window.event.srcElement.setAttribute("fill", SelectColor);
	 }
	function fClick(){ 
	   var Element =  window.event.srcElement;
	   if (Element.getAttribute("fill") == ClickColor){
		 ClickedElement = null;
		 SelectColor = ClickSelectColor;
		 window.event.srcElement.setAttribute("fill", mSelColor);
		 document.getElementById(GlobalId).id = "Layer_1";
		 GlobalId = "Layer_1";
	   }
	   else
	   {
		 if (ClickedElement != null){
		   ClickedElement.setAttribute("fill", ClickSelectColor);
		 }
	   
		 ClickedElement = window.event.srcElement;
		 ClickSelectColor = SelectColor;
		 window.event.srcElement.setAttribute("fill", ClickColor);      
		 document.getElementById(GlobalId).id = window.event.srcElement.id; 
		 GlobalId = window.event.srcElement.id;    
		
	   } 
	} 
	if (idClickedElement != null)
	{
	   ClickedElement   = document.getElementById(idClickedElement);
	   ClickSelectColor = ClickedElement.getAttribute("fill");  
	   ClickedElement.setAttribute("fill", ClickColor);       
	}
	  
	</script>  
	</svg>
